name: Products are sorted correctly for the selected sort option
description:
The user should be able to add products to the cart, remove them,
  sort the product list, and log out from the inventory page.
descriptionHtml:
The user should be able to add products to the cart, remove them,
sort the product list, and log out from the inventory page.

steps.name: And the user enters "standardUser" as the password
And the user clicks the Login button
Then the user should be on the "Inventory" page
When the user sorts the products by "Price (high to low)"
Then the products should be sorted by "Price (high to low)"
